productDisplayName: Nike Men's Chroma Thong White Red Flip Flop
description: flip flops have been in vogue since time immemorial. The nike Splash Thong, true to its name, will add a splash of color to your feet and life, transporting you to a world of absolute comfort and delight. They have a good grip, are comfortable, and can be worn with almost any kind of casual outfits. Upper Broad straps for improved comfort Synthetic leather straps Synthetic fabric toe separator for a soft feel Strap backing made of synthetic fabric for enhanced comfort Logo on strap Stitched detailing on straps for added style Midsole Foam footbed with synthetic upper layer for all day comfort Logo on heel Stitched detailing on the periphery Thong construction to hold the forefoot in place Outsole Herringbone pattern for good grip shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
